reviews.review_title: It's cool to be able to fly but...
reviews.review_description: All you can do is shoot at nothing and inside of the cockpit is poorly designed

So at first it seems fun and flying is always a fun thing but you really end up going nowhere and you're shooting at nothing and no matter how long you try to fly to the ground you never reach it it's very odd but good try
The price is cheap i can fly a plane 4K hd Ultra￼. I’m just wondering how to play multiplayer but really cool!
It’s bad and well I’m getting my money back

developer_response.body: We are sorry to hear that. Of course you can get your money back.

reviews.review_description: I found the game TOTALLY pointless! Bad graphics too, in this day & age surely you boys can do much better !?

reviews.review_title: Don’t have any enemies to shoot
reviews.review_description: I got the game 2 weeks ago and I’m just gonna say it. This game is not worth it

developer_response.body: Hello, thank you for your comment. Our game is a multiplayer game. To shoot, other users must be online at the same time. We are improving our game.

reviews.review_description: Wish there was a little bit more to this.

developer_response.body: We are sorry to hear that. Of course you can get your money back.
